tool_input.prompt: Write a risk-aware brief for operators who need to avoid churn, drift, and silent regressions. evidence_grounding_003. MarkOS Docs-first brief for operator. Ship the CLI, API, and MCP pipeline with contracts, webhooks, and an audit step. This agent is Grounded in your first-party data with human approval. Use loss aversion so the operator keeps agency without drift. Direct, quietly confident copy with restraint, precision, and data-dense proof. evidence_grounding_003. Keep every claim in bounds.
